title: Watching the Sunset Together
content: Ella and Jack climbed a small hill outside the city just before sunset. They brought sandwiches, fruit, and a blanket to sit on. As the sky slowly changed from blue to orange and pink, they watched quietly without speaking. The gentle wind made the moment feel peaceful. Jack reached for Ella's hand, and she smiled without looking away from the colorful sky. When the sun finally disappeared behind the mountains, Ella whispered, “I could stay here forever.” Jack answered, “As long as we're together, I could too.”
